findings.description: Section content is under 50 characters. The s4 body contains only an introductory sentence (~47 chars with markup): "`nablarch.core.cache.BasicStaticDataCache` の設定プロパティ名と設定内容の一覧。"
findings.source_evidence: Source section '設定内容詳細' leads directly into the subsection 'nablarch.core.cache.BasicStaticDataCacheの設定' with the property table. The intro sentence is a reasonable extraction but falls below the 50-character threshold.

findings.description: The inline code comment `// 使用者は、静的データがキャッシュにあるかを意識する必要はない` ("users do not need to be aware of whether static data is in cache") is omitted from the code example. This comment conveys a meaningful behavioral guarantee about cache transparency that is relevant to AI-assisted implementation guidance.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in '実装例' section contains the comment on the line after `cache.getValues("name", name);`: `// 使用者は、静的データがキャッシュにあるかを意識する必要はない`

findings.description: `SqlRow` is used in the `loadAll()` code example (`for (SqlRow row : results)`) but is absent from s2's hints array.
